--- order_by_directions.sql
GRAPH FinGraph FOR x IN [1] ORDER BY x, x ASC, x DESC, x ASCENDING, x DESCENDING RETURN x AS result

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLFor{
            For:   15,
            Ident: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 19,
              NameEnd: 20,
              Name:    "x",
            },
            Expr: &ast.ArrayLiteral{
              Array:  -1,
              Lbrack: 24,
              Rbrack: 26,
              Values: []ast.Expr{
                &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 25,
                  ValueEnd: 26,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLOrderBy{
            Order: 28,
            Items: []*ast.GQLOrderByItem{
              &ast.GQLOrderByItem{
                DirEnd: -1,
                Expr:   &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 37,
                  NameEnd: 38,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLOrderByItem{
                DirEnd: 45,
                Expr:   &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 40,
                  NameEnd: 41,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Dir: "ASC",
              },
              &ast.GQLOrderByItem{
                DirEnd: 53,
                Expr:   &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 47,
                  NameEnd: 48,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Dir: "DESC",
              },
              &ast.GQLOrderByItem{
                DirEnd: 66,
                Expr:   &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 55,
                  NameEnd: 56,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Dir: "ASC",
              },
              &ast.GQLOrderByItem{
                DirEnd: 80,
                Expr:   &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 68,
                  NameEnd: 69,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Dir: "DESC",
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 81,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 88,
                  NameEnd: 89,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    90,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 93,
                    NameEnd: 99,
                    Name:    "result",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph FOR x IN [1] ORDER BY x, x ASC, x DESC, x ASC, x DESC RETURN x AS result
